name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖[New] Mini Bucket Shoulder Bag. This mini bucket shoulder bag is crafted from blue leather. This accessory features a hook closure and a webbing shoulder strap design, cleverly blending functionality and modernity. Blue leather, light gold-tone metal hardware, red and green webbing shoulder strap, cotton-linen blend lining, zip pocket, Gucci logo zip pull, shoulder strap (42cm high), hook closure.
name_cn:
💖With full original green box packaging💖[New] Mini Bucket Shoulder Bag. This mini bucket shoulder bag is crafted from blue leather. This accessory features a hook closure and a webbing shoulder strap design, cleverly blending functionality and modernity. Blue leather, light gold-tone metal hardware, red and green webbing shoulder strap, cotton-linen blend lining, zip pocket, Gucci logo zip pull, shoulder strap (42cm high), hook closure.
Model: 782908.
Size: 18.5(L) x 20.5(W) x 12.5cm(H)
Color: Blue/Original Leather.
Made in Italy
Model height 177cm
Weight: approx. 0.450kg
